languages.text: {n}Повинуясь вашей воле, Мастер вокса передает сигнал о начале миссии всем участникам.{/n} "Да защитит вас Император, Лорд-Капитан".
{n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Повинуясь вашей воле, Мастер вокса передает сигнал о начале миссии всем участникам.{/n} "Да защитит вас Император, Лорд-Капитан".

traits.locale_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."
{n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."
{n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}ヴォックス・マスターが任務開始をすべての参加者に告げた。{/n}「皇帝があなたを守り給え、隊長様」
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴォックス・マスターが任務開始をすべての参加者に告げた。{n}「皇帝があなたを守り給え、隊長様。」

languages.text: {n}Acatando tu decisión, la maestra de vocos da la señal de comienzo de misión a todos los participantes.{/n} «Que el Emperador le proteja, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Acatando tu decisión, la maestra de vocos da la señal de comienzo de misión a todos los participantes.{/n} «Que el Emperador le proteja, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: {n}遵照你的意志，音阵大师向所有参战人员发出行动信号。{/n}“愿帝皇庇佑您，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}遵照你的意志，音阵大师向所有参战人员发出行动信号。{/n}“愿帝皇庇佑您，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}Deinem Willen gehorchend gibt die Voxmeisterin allen Teilnehmern das Signal für den Beginn der Mission.{/n} "Möge der Imperator Euch schützen, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Deinem Willen gehorchend gibt die Voxmeisterin allen Teilnehmern das Signal für den Beginn der Mission.{/n} "Möge der Imperator Euch schützen, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}İradene uyan Voks Üstadı, tüm katılımcılara görevin başladığını işaret ediyor.{/n} "İmparator sizi korusun Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}İradene uyan Voks Üstadı, tüm katılımcılara görevin başladığını işaret ediyor.{/n} "İmparator sizi korusun Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: {n}Se pliant à votre volonté, la maîtresse-vox informe tous les participants du début de la mission.{/n} « Que l'Empereur-Dieu vous protège, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Obeying your will, the Vox Master signals the start of the mission to all participants.{/n} "May the Emperor protect you, Lord Captain."
